summary: Auth Security Pack Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Full password reset flow verified: forgot-password creates token with 30-min expiry, reset-password validates/uses token, reused token returns 'already been used', expired token returns 'expired', login works after reset. Rate limiting verified on login/register/forgot-password. Honeypot anti-bot on register silently rejects bots (returns empty token). Frontend: ForgotPasswordPage renders with email input, submit button, back to login link, shows 'Check your email' success state. ResetPasswordPage renders with password fields, validates min 6 chars and password match. LoginPageV2 has 'Forgot password?' link pointing to /forgot-password. RegisterPageV2 has hidden honeypot field (parent opacity:0, height:0). Email service in DRY-RUN mode logs reset URLs to console. Regression: Phase E discount requests and Phase C.5 reorder APIs verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiting is in-memory per-process - will reset on server restart and won't work across multiple backend instances. Consider Redis-based rate limiting for production.
Email service correctly logs to console in dry-run mode when RESEND_API_KEY is not set - this is intentional for development/testing.
seed_data_creation: Password reset tokens created during testing (auto-cleaned by expiry)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth Security Pack is complete and verified. Key points: 1) POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns neutral message for both existing and non-existing emails (security). 2) Token stored in password_reset_tokens collection with 30-min expiry. 3) POST /api/auth/reset-password validates token, resets password, marks token as used. 4) Reused token returns 'already been used', expired token returns 'expired'. 5) Rate limiting: login (10/5min per IP:email), register (5/10min per IP), forgot-password (3/5min per IP:email), reset-password (5/5min per IP). 6) Honeypot: register with 'website' field filled returns empty token (bot trap). 7) Email service in DRY-RUN mode logs to console. 8) Frontend pages have data-testid attributes: forgot-password-page, forgot-email-input, forgot-submit-btn, forgot-back-login, forgot-password-success, reset-password-page, reset-password-input, reset-confirm-input, reset-submit-btn, reset-error, forgot-password-link (on login page).

backend_forgot_password.POST /api/auth/forgot-password (existing: PASS - Returns neutral message, creates token

backend_reset_password.POST /api/auth/reset-password (valid tok: PASS - Resets password, marks token used
backend_reset_password.Login after reset: PASS - Login works with new password

backend_rate_limiting.Forgot password rate limit (3/5min): PASS - Returns neutral message even when rate limited

backend_honeypot.Register with honeypot filled: PASS - Returns empty token (bot silently rejected)

frontend_login_page.Navigation: PASS - Clicking link navigates to forgot password page

frontend_register_page.Form fields: PASS - All fields present with data-testid

email_service.Dry-run mode: PASS - Logs reset URL to console when no RESEND_API_KEY

mocked_apis_list: Resend email service - dry-run mode, logs to console instead of sending emails
